tips: Starting from Beginner level — covering beginner, intermediate, advanced phase(s).
Complete the mini-project at the end of each skill to solidify learning.
Each skill gets proportional time based on its complexity — heavier skills get more weeks.
Your 26-week window covers ~83% of ideal depth. Focus on core concepts and use the project at the end of each skill to practice.
Free resources selected — Kaggle, freeCodeCamp, and YouTube are your best friends.

roadmap_result.summary: Personalized roadmap for **Android Developer** | Level: Beginner | 15 skills to learn | ~10.2 months at 10.5h/week

phases.beginner: Kotlin syntax, null safety, data classes, collections
phases.intermediate: Coroutines, Android basics, Jetpack components, MVVM
phases.advanced: Jetpack Compose, Hilt DI, Flow, testing, app architecture

tips: 📅 Study 10.5 hours/week consistently — daily practice beats weekend cramming.
🎯 Focus on one skill at a time. Complete each phase before moving on.
🛠️ Build the mini-project at the end of each skill — it cements your learning.
📊 Track your progress weekly and adjust your plan if needed.
⚠️ Your deadline (3 months) may be tight. Estimated time needed: 10.2 months. Consider increasing study hours or reducing scope.
💰 All recommended resources are free. Kaggle, freeCodeCamp, and YouTube are your best friends.
